Graduation Writing Requirement

Students can attempt to fulfill the requirement after 60 earned units; students should complete the requirement before senior year. Can complete with a GWR-approved course or by enrolling in UNIV 4401 GWR Portfolio.
Choose one of the following: ART 4481 or ART 4482.
